# Supplier / Contractor Risk Assessment

## Purpose
Evaluate supplier risks prior to selection or renewal and document mitigation actions.

## Audience
Procurement Lead, Vendor Manager, Risk Manager, Legal.

## 1. Supplier Details
- **Supplier name:**
- **Procurement category:**
- **Assessment date:**
- **Assessor:**

## 2. Risk Factors & Scoring
| Risk Factor | Weight (%) | Score (1-5) | Weighted Score | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Financial stability |  |  |  |  |
| Reputation & ethics |  |  |  |  |
| Performance history |  |  |  |  |
| Regulatory compliance |  |  |  |  |
| Data security & privacy |  |  |  |  |
| Business continuity |  |  |  |  |

## 3. Risk Summary
- **Overall risk rating:**
- **Key concerns:**

## 4. Recommended Mitigation Actions
| Action | Owner | Due Date | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Risk factors weighted and scored.
- [ ] Overall risk rating assigned.
- [ ] Mitigation actions documented with owners.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Supplier assessment supports procurement decision-making.
- Risk mitigations are approved and tracked.
